description_long: This potted plant features a slender, dark green stem with several broad, jagged-edged leaves branching out at various heights. Clusters of small, round, red fruits hang from the plant, resembling cherry tomatoes or nightshade berries. The leaves are a deep green with visible veins, and the fruits are smooth and glossy, attached by thin stems. The plant appears to be young and delicate, with a sparse arrangement of foliage and fruit. There is no visible pot or container, suggesting the focus is on the plant itself. The overall appearance is naturalistic, with a realistic representation of leaf and fruit textures.
description: A slender plant with broad, jagged green leaves and clusters of small, round red fruits, resembling a young tomato or nightshade plant. The foliage is sparse and the fruits are glossy and smooth.
description_view_0: The plant is seen with its main stem and two clusters of red fruits clearly visible, with broad leaves extending outward.
description_view_1: This view shows the plant from the side, highlighting the vertical alignment of the stem and the lower fruit cluster hanging down.
description_view_2: The plant is viewed at an angle, displaying the spread of the leaves and both fruit clusters, with the upper leaves more prominent.
description_view_3: The plant is seen from a slightly offset front, with the main fruit cluster partially obscured by a large leaf.
attribute_plant_species: cherry tomato (Solanum lycopersicum var. cerasiforme) or nightshade
